name: Boston Baked Brown Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 cups buttermilk (or 2 cups milk and 1 tablespoon lemon juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the buttermilk, all-purpose flour, cornmeal, molasses, whole wheat flour, and baking soda.
2. Mix all ingredients for 2 minutes on medium speed.
3. Pour the batter into a greased angel food pan or Bundt pan.
4. Bake at 325°F (163°C) for 1 hour.
5. Enjoy!
